DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT NICHOLAS EVANS' MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. IT IS GRANTED AS TO DEMAND NUMBER 22. PLAINTIFFS SHALL PRODUCE ALL DOCUMENTS REQUESTED BY DEMAND NUMBER 22 BY JANUARY 14, 2013. PLAINTIFFS HAVE NOT PROVEN THAT IT WOULD BE UNDULY BURDENSOME TO PRODUCE THEM. THE MOTION TO COMPEL IS DENIED AS TO ALL OTHER DEMANDS WITHOUT PREJUDICE ON GROUNDS IT IS MOOT AS TO THE OTHER DEMANDS BECAUSE PLAINTIFFS SAY THE DOCUMENTS HAVE BEEN PRODUCED AND DEFENDANT DOES NOT AT THIS TIME PROVIDE ANY EVIDENCE TO THE CONTRARY. SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COURT TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRUCE HIGHMAN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED

Mtn To Compel Responses To Req For Demand For Production Of Docs And To Produce Docs
Off Calendar Dec-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT NICHOLAS EVANS' Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Demand For Production Of Documents And To Produce Documents is Granted in part and denied in part. It is granted as to Demand Number 22. Plaintiffs shall produce all documents requested by Demand Number 22 by January 14, 2013. Plaintiffs have not proven that it would be unduly burdensome to produce them. The motion to compel is denied as to all other Demands without prejudice on grounds it is moot as to the other Demands because plaintiffs say the documents have been produced and defendant does not at this time provide any evidence to the contrary. Sanctions are denied. Court to prepare order. Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported
